changeSet.author: Manuel
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE public.utm_logstash_filter SET filter_version='3.0.5', updated_at=now(), logstash_filter= $$ # UTMStack filter, version 1.0.1
pipeline: - dataTypes: - utmstack steps: # Only parse as JSON if it contains the standard schema with "msg": and "args": - json: source: raw where: 'contains("raw", "\"msg\":") && contains("raw", "\"args\":")'
# If it doesn't have the standard schema, just store the content in log.message using grok - grok: source: raw patterns: - fieldName: log.message pattern: '{{.greedy}}' where: '!contains("raw", "\"msg\":") || !contains("raw", "\"args\":")'
$$ WHERE id=1531;
